"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-776", "name": "Improper Restriction of Recursive Entity References in DTDs ('XML Entity Expansion')"}], "description": "### Impact
`fast-xml-parser` processes multiple "DOCTYPE" declarations within a single XML document. Each declaration passes its entities to `@nodable/entities` through `addInputEntities()`.

`addInputEntities()` resets the entity expansion counters every time it is called. An attacker can therefore insert additional DOCTYPE declarations to repeatedly reset maxTotalExpansions and maxExpandedLength during one parse operation.

This allows a crafted XML document to exceed the configured entity-expansion limits and can cause excessive CPU use, event-loop blocking, memory exhaustion, and process termination.

### Workarounds
- Manually check if multiple DOCTYPEs are not present in input contents
- Update to v5.10.1
- Keep `processEntity` flag off", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8r6m-32jq-jx6q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-21T22:06:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8r6m-32jq-jx6q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8r6m-32jq-jx6q"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-21T22:06:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-parser/security/advisories/GHSA-8r6m-32jq-jx6q", "https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-parser/commit/4e546e03987662de5495d050b5fba26bea65383f", "https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-parser/releases/tag/v5.10.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8r6m-32jq-jx6q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-parser/security-advisories/GHSA-8r6m-32jq-jx6q", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/NaturalIntelligence/fast-xml-parser", "summary": "fast-xml-parser: Repeated DOCTYPE declarations reset entity expansion limits", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T22:06:38Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8r6m-32jq-jx6q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.10.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "fast-xml-parser"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.9.3, < 5.10.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: fast-xml-parser: Repeated DOCTYPE declarations reset entity expansion limits
